type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2022, D&F were not reportable because the source testing results were below the Level of Quantification as defined for NPRI Part 3 reporting, so releases were not calcualted or reported.  THe measured D&F congeners from the 2023 source testing program were generally higher than 2022 and the results were above the LoQ.  Therefore, releases were quantified and reported for 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: main driver - moisture content for raw meal was 2.7% in 2022 and decreased to 0.05% in 2023 - this caused a big increase in dust emissions from handling this material.  Some increases in throughputs as well, but that is having less of an effect.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: main driver - moisture content for raw meal was 2.7% in 2022 and decreased to 0.05% in 2023 - this caused a big increase in dust emissions from handling this material.  Some increases in throughputs as well, but that is having less of an effect.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment:
In 2023, the total hydrochloric acid (HCl) emissions were initially calculated as 4.94 tonnes, which was below the reporting threshold, hence, HCL wasn't reported. However, this value was found to be incorrect. The revised total HCl emissions for 2023 are 47.01 tonnes, and this correction will be reflected in the updated report.

For 2024, the estimated HCl emissions are 27.43 tonnes. This decrease from the revised 2023 value is attributed to lower emissions identified in the updated source testing data.
